description: A window-bound future-read of the stage-8a class: the monitor's "now" window loses its upper bound, so a post-hoc replay reads past the check tick. No training symptom (post-hoc monitor bug); an offline analysis is not expected to catch it — a null the report shows honestly.
applied_diff:
--- a/researcher/registry.py
+++ b/researcher/registry.py
@@ -238,7 +238,7 @@
     # unbounded "now" window read the future — checks before a lever saw the
     # lever's effect and "detected" it early (observed as impossible 10-sd
     # pre-lever shifts on a frozen policy).
-    now_mask = (ticks >= now_tick - window) & (ticks < now_tick)
+    now_mask = (ticks >= now_tick - window)
     prev_mask = (ticks >= now_tick - 2 * window) & (ticks < now_tick - window)
     now_vals, prev_vals = values[now_mask], values[prev_mask]
     min_n = int(m.get("min_samples", 5))

proposals.rationale: rssm/kl has sat at the free-nats floor (1.0) for the last 10 updates — the posterior is not using its budget (collapse indicator). Recommend lowering free_nats to 0.5 and observing kl/recon.
reward/rollout coefficient of variation is 4.0 and no logged scalar decomposes it — recommend adding `reward/per_region` so the variance source is attributable.
reward/rollout coefficient of variation is 4.0 and no logged scalar decomposes it — recommend adding `reward/per_episode_breakdown` so the variance source is attributable.
